chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3591 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For order on MA No.19032/2025 (Urgent). 2. For order on MA No.19033/2025 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of case. 29.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Jamil, Advocate for Applicants a/w both applicants. -------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this Criminal Bail Application the applicants, namely, Adnan Ahmed Siddiqui s/o Shakeel Ahmed Siddiqui and Mst. Sadaf Adnan w/o Adnan Ahmed Siddiqui seek protective bail in Crime No.478/2025 for the offences under sections 22(b) and 17(b) of Emigration Ordinance, 1979 registered at Police Station FIA, AHT Circle, Karachi. Counsel for the applicants submits that the applicant have been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicants apprehend their arrest by the hands of the police, which humiliate them, therefore, they may be granted protective bail enabling them to approach and surrender before the trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants above-named are admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) each with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling them to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicants do not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited.

Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants above-named are admitted protective bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) each with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling them to approach and surrender before the trial Court for a period of fifteen days. In case the applicants do not surrender before the trial Court within the above stipulated period, the surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant Crl. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Farhan/PS
